annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window-to-zone tracking: snap/unsnap notifications, pre-snap geometry for restore, floating state, zone geometry, auto-snap to last zone, restore to persisted zone, resolution-change handling, and keyboard-navigation feedback.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Record that a window was snapped to a zone.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Zone UUID.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen where window was snapped (empty to auto-detect).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Record that a window was snapped to multiple zones.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: List of zone UUIDs (first is primary).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen where window was snapped (empty to auto-detect).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Record that a window was unsnapped.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Batch snap confirmations: process multiple windowSnapped/windowUnsnapped in one D-Bus call. Used by the KWin effect after resnap stagger completes. JSON array of {windowId, zoneId, screenId, isRestore}.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: JSON array of snap confirmations.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return the zone UUID a window is snapped to, or empty string.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Zone UUID or empty string.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return all zone UUIDs a window spans (multi-zone snap).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Zone UUIDs the window spans.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return window IDs currently snapped to the given zone.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Zone UUID.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window IDs snapped to the zone.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return all window IDs that are snapped to any zone.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: All snapped window IDs.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return JSON array of empty zones for Snap Assist continuation. Same format as emptyZonesJson from dragStopped.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen name (e.g. DP-1).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: JSON array of {zoneId, x, y, width, height, borderWidth, borderRadius}.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return the last zone a window was snapped to (for auto-snap).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Last used zone UUID or empty string.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Store window geometry before tiling (snap or autotile). If overwrite is false (snap mode), skips if entry exists.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window X position.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window Y position.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window width.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window height.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen connector name where window is located (for cross-screen restore).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: If false, skip if entry exists (snap). If true, always overwrite (autotile).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return true if pre-tile geometry is stored for the window.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if pre-tile geometry exists.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return pre-tile geometry (pre-snap or pre-autotile) validated against current screen bounds (adjusts off-screen). Returns found, x, y, width, height.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if geometry was found and validated.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: X position (if found).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Y position (if found).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Width (if found).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Height (if found).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Clear stored pre-tile geometry for a window.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Set whether a window is floating (not snapped).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True to float.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return true if the window is floating.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if floating.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return all window IDs that are floating.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Floating window IDs.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Notify that a snapped window was dragged without activation trigger. If tracked as snapped, handles unsnap: saves zone for restore, marks floating, clears zone assignment.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Unsnap for float toggle; saves zone for later restore.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return the zone to restore to when unfloating (if any).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if a pre-float zone was stored.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Zone to restore to (if found).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Clear saved pre-float zone for the window.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Calculate unfloat restore geometry and zone IDs in one call. Returns JSON with found, zoneIds, x, y, width, height. Supports multi-zone: combined geometry of all pre-float zones.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen name for geometry calculation.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: JSON: {found, zoneIds, x, y, width, height}.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return zone geometry as JSON for the given zone (primary screen).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Zone UUID.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: JSON e.g. {x, y, width, height}.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return zone geometry as JSON for the given zone on the given screen.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Zone UUID.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen name (e.g. DP-1).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: JSON e.g. {x, y, width, height}.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Snap a window to its app-rule-defined zone (highest priority auto-snap). Returns geometry and shouldSnap.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window to snap.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window's current screen (e.g. DP-1).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if window is on all desktops.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Snap X (if shouldSnap).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Snap Y (if shouldSnap).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Snap width (if shouldSnap).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Snap height (if shouldSnap).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if an app rule matched and window should be snapped.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Compute snap geometry for auto-snap to last used zone. Respects moveNewWindowsToLastZone setting. Returns geometry and shouldSnap.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window to snap.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window's current screen (e.g. DP-1).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if window is on all desktops.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Snap X (if shouldSnap).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Snap Y (if shouldSnap).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Snap width (if shouldSnap).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Snap height (if shouldSnap).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if caller should apply the geometry.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Snap window to first empty zone (auto-assign). Only fires if layout has autoAssign enabled.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window to snap.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window's current screen (e.g. DP-1).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if window is on all desktops.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Snap X (if shouldSnap).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Snap Y (if shouldSnap).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Snap width (if shouldSnap).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Snap height (if shouldSnap).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if auto-assign matched and window should be snapped.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Restore window to its persisted zone (remembered from last close or previous session). Returns geometry and shouldRestore.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window to restore.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window's screen (e.g. DP-1).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if window is on all desktops.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Restore X (if shouldRestore).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Restore Y (if shouldRestore).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Restore width (if shouldRestore).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Restore height (if shouldRestore).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if caller should apply the geometry.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Run the full 4-level snap-restore fallback chain server-side in one call: appRule → persisted → emptyZone → lastZone. Returns geometry and shouldSnap on first match.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window to restore.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window's current screen (e.g. DP-1).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if window is on all desktops.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Snap X (if shouldSnap).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Snap Y (if shouldSnap).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Snap width (if shouldSnap).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Snap height (if shouldSnap).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if any strategy matched and window should be snapped.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return updated window geometries after resolution change (respects keepWindowsInZonesOnResolutionChange).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: JSON array of {windowId, x, y, width, height}.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Report keyboard-navigation result from KWin effect; daemon emits navigationFeedback for OSD.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if navigation succeeded.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Action name (e.g. move, focus).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Reason string (e.g. no adjacent zone).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Source zone ID for OSD highlighting (optional).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Target zone ID for OSD highlighting (optional).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen name where navigation occurred (for OSD placement).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted when a window's zone assignment changes.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Zone UUID (or empty if unsnapped).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted when keyboard shortcut requests float toggle (KWin effect reacts).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True to float, false to unfloat.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted when KWin effect reports navigation result via reportNavigationFeedback (for OSD).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if navigation succeeded.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Action name (e.g. move, focus).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Reason string (e.g. no adjacent zone).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Source zone ID for OSD highlighting.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Target zone ID for OSD highlighting.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen name where navigation occurred (for OSD placement).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted when resnapToNewLayout is called. JSON array of window moves for KWin to apply.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: JSON array [{windowId, targetZoneId, x, y, width, height}, ...]

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted when the daemon's layout becomes available and there are pending zone restores. The KWin effect should retry restoring untracked windows when receiving this signal.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted after panel geometry has settled so the KWin effect should call getUpdatedWindowGeometries and apply those geometries to snapped windows. Fixes shifted windows after closing the KDE panel editor.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted when a window's floating state changes (e.g., when a floating window is drag-snapped). The KWin effect should listen to this to keep its local floating cache in sync.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window stable identifier (windowClass:resourceName without pointer address).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: New floating state.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen where the window is located.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Daemon-driven float toggle. KWin calls this with the active window; daemon does the logic and emits applyGeometryRequested.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier (from KWin).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen where window is located.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Set a window's floating state explicitly (directional, not toggle). Routes to autotile engine for autotile screens, handles snap mode locally. Used by minimize/unminimize, drag-to-float, and monocle unmaximize.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier (from KWin).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen where window is located.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True to float, false to unfloat.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Daemon requests KWin to apply geometry. zoneId empty = float restore only; zoneId set = apply and call windowSnapped.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window to apply geometry to.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: JSON {x, y, width, height}.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Zone to snap to (empty for float restore).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen for OSD placement.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Daemon requests KWin to activate (focus) a window. Used by daemon-driven focus/cycle navigation.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window to activate.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Daemon requests KWin to apply geometries for a batch of windows. Daemon handles zone bookkeeping internally — effect just applies geometries with stagger.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: JSON array of [{windowId, x, y, width, height, targetZoneId, sourceZoneId}].

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Navigation action type (rotate, resnap, snap_all) for feedback.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Daemon requests KWin to raise windows in order (z-order restoration).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Ordered list of window IDs (bottom-to-top).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Record whether the last snap was user-initiated (for snap-to-last-zone filtering).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if user performed the snap (drag or shortcut), false if auto-snapped.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Report that the cursor has moved to a different screen. Called by KWin effect when cursor crosses monitor boundaries.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Name of the screen the cursor is now on (e.g. DP-1).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Notify daemon that a window was closed (cleanup).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Notify daemon that a window was activated/focused.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen where window is located.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Resnap all windows from the previous layout to the current layout. Maps by zone number (1->1, 2->2) with cycling when new layout has fewer zones. Call after switching layouts.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Set whether a window is sticky (visible on all virtual desktops).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if window is on all desktops.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Trigger snap-all-windows from daemon shortcut. Emits snapAllWindowsRequested signal for the KWin effect to collect unsnapped windows and assign them to zones.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen where cursor is located.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Calculate zone assignments for a list of unsnapped windows. Called by KWin effect after collecting unsnapped windows on the target screen.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: List of unsnapped window IDs.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen for layout/geometry resolution.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: JSON array [{windowId, targetZoneId, x, y, width, height}, ...]

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Daemon-driven move: get target zone and geometry for moving a window in a direction.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: JSON: {success, reason, zoneId, geometryJson, sourceZoneId, screenName}

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Daemon-driven focus: get window ID to activate in adjacent zone.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: JSON: {success, reason, windowIdToActivate, sourceZoneId, targetZoneId, screenName}

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Daemon-driven restore: get pre-snap geometry for restoring a snapped window.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: JSON: {success, found, x, y, width, height}

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Daemon-driven cycle: get next/prev window in same zone to activate.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: JSON: {success, reason, windowIdToActivate, zoneId, screenName}

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Daemon-driven swap: get geometries and zone IDs for swapping with adjacent zone.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: JSON: {success, reason, windowId1, x1, y1, w1, h1, zoneId1, windowId2, x2, y2, w2, h2, zoneId2, screenName, sourceZoneId, targetZoneId}

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Daemon-driven push: get empty zone and geometry for pushing window.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: JSON: {success, reason, zoneId, geometryJson, sourceZoneId, screenName}

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Daemon-driven snap: get zone and geometry for snapping to zone by number (1-9).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: JSON: {success, reason, zoneId, geometryJson, sourceZoneId, screenName}

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted when snap-all-windows shortcut is triggered. KWin effect should collect unsnapped windows and call calculateSnapAllWindows.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen to operate on.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted when a specific window (e.g. from Snap Assist) should be moved to a zone.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier to move.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Target zone UUID.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: JSON {x, y, width, height} for the zone.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Convenience: snap a window to a specific zone by ID. Resolves geometry, handles bookkeeping, emits applyGeometryRequested.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Target zone UUID.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Convenience: swap two specific windows by their IDs. Resolves geometries, handles bookkeeping for both, emits applyGeometryRequested for each.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: First window identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Second window identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Get comprehensive state for a single window. Returns JSON with windowId, zoneId, screenId, isFloating, isSticky.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: JSON: {windowId, zoneId, screenId, isFloating, isSticky}.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Get state for all tracked windows (TUI dashboard). Returns JSON array of window state objects.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: JSON array of {windowId, zoneId, screenId, isFloating, isSticky}.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Unified window state change stream. Emitted on snap, unsnap, float, unfloat, and screen change events.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window whose state changed.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: JSON: {windowId, zoneId, screenId, isFloating, changeType}. changeType: snapped, unsnapped, floated, unfloated, screen_changed.
